scope: Navigation fix audit + full audit of cited files for Jekyll personal portfolio site (Minimal Mistakes v4.28.0, GitHub Pages)

findings.title: Minimal Mistakes masthead does NOT support children dropdown (ROOT CAUSE)
findings.prosecutor_summary: Masthead template does not support children nav items; root cause of the original bug
findings.defender_summary: Correct analysis but bug is already fixed; historical documentation
findings.judge_rationale: Bug is resolved; current code is correct; no further action needed

findings.title: Broken navigation deployed to production without validation
findings.prosecutor_summary: No CI validation caught the broken navigation before deployment
findings.defender_summary: Personal site with 7-minute fix time; CI validation is disproportionate
findings.judge_rationale: CI for a 13-line YAML file on a personal site is over-engineering

findings.title: Chart.js CDN failure silently breaks charts on trading.html
findings.prosecutor_summary: Chart.js CDN failure leaves empty chart canvases with no error message
findings.defender_summary: Navigation and static content still work; charts are supplementary visualizations
findings.judge_rationale: Real issue: empty charts with no explanation on CDN failure; trivial fix with try/catch
findings.recommended_direction: Wrap Chart instantiation in try/catch with fallback message in chart containers

findings.title: Chart.js CDN failure + render() no error boundary on live-trading.html
findings.prosecutor_summary: CDN failure causes unhandled promise rejection; chart section dies silently
findings.defender_summary: Data tables render before chart call; only equity chart fails; WIP page with dummy data
findings.judge_rationale: Missing .catch() and try/catch is a genuine code quality issue, especially given documented migration plan
findings.recommended_direction: Add try/catch inside render(), .catch() on invocation, and guard Chart instantiation separately

findings.title: CDN scripts loaded without Subresource Integrity (SRI)
findings.prosecutor_summary: CDN compromise could inject arbitrary JavaScript; SRI is the standard mitigation
findings.defender_summary: Agrees; fix cost is low
findings.judge_rationale: Both sides agree; standard security practice with trivial implementation cost
findings.recommended_direction: Generate SRI hash for Chart.js 4.4.7 and add integrity and crossorigin attributes to both script tags

findings.title: innerHTML with future external data source, no sanitization
findings.prosecutor_summary: innerHTML without sanitization creates stored XSS risk after data source migration
findings.defender_summary: Data is currently inline and owner-controlled; vulnerability is theoretical for unwritten code
findings.judge_rationale: Current code has zero XSS surface; add sanitization when external fetch is implemented

findings.title: Gemfile.lock excluded from version control
findings.prosecutor_summary: Non-reproducible builds from unpinned dependencies
findings.defender_summary: GitHub Pages pins gem versions server-side; excluding Gemfile.lock is standard practice
findings.judge_rationale: Standard practice for GitHub Pages; github-pages gem manages version compatibility

findings.title: Greedy navigation hides Trading items on medium viewports
findings.prosecutor_summary: 6 nav items push Trading/Live Trading to hamburger on medium viewports
findings.defender_summary: Greedy navigation is intended theme behavior; hamburger menu is standard responsive design
findings.judge_rationale: Theme feature working as designed; not a defect

findings.title: No cross-link between Trading and Live Trading pages
findings.prosecutor_summary: Related trading pages have no in-page cross-reference
findings.defender_summary: Both pages accessible via top navigation; minor UX suggestion
findings.judge_rationale: Quick UX win; related content should cross-reference each other
findings.recommended_direction: Add cross-link sentence or button near top of each trading page pointing to the other

findings.title: No guard against navigation regression
findings.prosecutor_summary: No comments or CI prevent using children syntax again
findings.defender_summary: Single developer who knows the constraint; a YAML comment is sufficient
findings.judge_rationale: One-line comment costs nothing and prevents a known footgun
findings.recommended_direction: Add comment to navigation.yml warning that children is not supported in masthead nav

findings.title: Synchronous Chart.js (201KB) blocks page rendering
findings.prosecutor_summary: Synchronous script load blocks content population on live-trading.html
findings.defender_summary: Impact under 100ms on normal connections; static HTML already visible
findings.judge_rationale: Negligible real-world impact for a personal portfolio site

findings.title: Google Fonts render-blocking in head
findings.prosecutor_summary: Google Fonts CSS is render-blocking; delays First Contentful Paint
findings.defender_summary: display=swap prevents blank page; preconnect reduces latency; standard practice
findings.judge_rationale: display=swap plus preconnect is the recommended Google Fonts pattern

findings.title: Duplicate Chart.js load without prefetch
findings.prosecutor_summary: No prefetch for Chart.js on non-trading pages; version drift risk
findings.defender_summary: Browser caching handles repeat loads; standard static site pattern
findings.judge_rationale: Browser caching makes this a non-issue; prefetch would waste bandwidth on non-trading pages

findings.title: Google Fonts loaded without SRI
findings.prosecutor_summary: External stylesheet without SRI; theoretical supply chain risk
findings.defender_summary: SRI is impractical for Google Fonts dynamic CSS; both sides agree on LOW
findings.judge_rationale: SRI is incompatible with Google Fonts dynamic CSS generation; not actionable

findings.title: No Content Security Policy headers
findings.prosecutor_summary: No defense-in-depth against XSS
findings.defender_summary: GitHub Pages does not support custom HTTP headers; platform constraint
findings.judge_rationale: Platform constraint; not actionable in a meaningful way

findings.title: Resume PDF and photo in working directory
findings.prosecutor_summary: Personal files could be exposed during local development
findings.defender_summary: Not in version control, not deployed; only theoretical local dev exposure
findings.judge_rationale: Non-issue for production; standard gitignore practice

findings.title: layout: none should be layout: null in index.html
findings.prosecutor_summary: Works by accident via Jekyll fallback for missing layouts; could break in future versions
findings.defender_summary: Agrees; genuine code quality issue; LOW severity
findings.judge_rationale: Trivial one-word fix; both sides agree it should be corrected
findings.recommended_direction: Change layout: none to layout: null in index.html front matter

findings.title: GitHub Pages custom_404: false despite 404.md
findings.prosecutor_summary: GitHub Pages API reports custom_404: false; may indicate custom 404 is not active
findings.defender_summary: API field reflects UI settings, not Jekyll behavior; 404.md produces valid 404.html
findings.judge_rationale: Disputed finding resolved in Defender's favor; API field does not govern Jekyll-generated 404 pages

findings.title: 36KB trading page with 9 hidden detail sections in DOM
findings.prosecutor_summary: 36KB page with 719 elements always in DOM; architecture observation
findings.defender_summary: Trivial for modern browsers; style/architecture observation, not a bug
findings.judge_rationale: Standard show/hide pattern within acceptable limits

findings.title: Unescaped ampersand in P&L table header
findings.prosecutor_summary: Invalid HTML; ampersand should be escaped as &
findings.defender_summary: Agrees; no visible impact; standards compliance
findings.judge_rationale: Both sides agree; one-character fix for HTML validity
findings.recommended_direction: Change P&L to P&L on line 230 of live-trading.html

findings.title: Inline scripts/styles incompatible with strict CSP
findings.prosecutor_summary: Code is incompatible with strict CSP; would break if CSP is enforced
findings.defender_summary: GitHub Pages does not enforce CSP; standard practice for the platform
findings.judge_rationale: Standard architecture for GitHub Pages + Minimal Mistakes; not actionable
